summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hishab Nikash Pro new features: Products CRUD, Invoice Print template, and Low-stock email alerts. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor print navigation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Print button/icon not easily accessible or clickable from invoice detail page
ui_bugs.selector: Print button in invoice detail header

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /sales/{id}/print redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/companies/ckfrozen/products creates new product (201 status)
Frontend: Products page loads with product table showing name, cost, sell, case price
Frontend: Add Product modal opens and saves product
Frontend: Edit Product modal functionality available
Frontend: Inventory page has Send Low Stock Alert button
Frontend: Invoice Print page component exists with CK Frozen layout
Frontend: Sidebar has Products navigation item
Authentication: Test session token works correctly
Email Integration: Resend API sends low stock alerts to ckfrozenfishus@gmail.com
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix print button navigation from Invoice Detail page to Print page. The InvoicePrint component is properly implemented but the navigation/routing from invoice detail needs to be fixed. Consider adding a more prominent print button or fixing the existing print icon click handler.
